note: User-need-driven harvesting targets. Hypothesis layer — not observed demand. corpus_gap → harvest; retrieval_gap → tune retrieval first.

targets.user_situation: What if I commit and it turns out to be the wrong life?
targets.missing_source_profile: A credible person who made a high-stakes choice fearing regret and can speak honestly to how the fear resolved — vulnerable, not prescriptive.
targets.anti_pattern_notes: Do NOT minimize ("you can't really go wrong") or push hard. A lived account of committing despite genuine fear of regret — and what was learned about regret itself — lands.
suggested_queries: "Huberman Lab" fear of regret vulnerable official
"The Tim Ferriss Show" fear of regret vulnerable official
"The Tim Ferriss Show" dread anxiety reframe
targets.coverage_evidence: Hinted probe: 0/2 land, 1 wrong-register, 1 EXCLUDED-register served. Static: partial — No exact register+type match. 1 register-only and 2 type-only match(es). Gap kind: retrieval_gap.

targets.user_situation: How do I put something out when I'm terrified it isn't good enough?
targets.missing_source_profile: A credible person who shipped imperfect work and reframes bravery over perfection / the cost of protecting a fragile self-image — vulnerable, gentle.
targets.anti_pattern_notes: Direct/challenging amplifies the fear that's already freezing them — exclude it. "Bravery not perfection" / permission-to-be-bad-first lands; "stop being a perfectionist and just ship" does not.
suggested_queries: "The School of Greatness" wont ship unless perfect so freezes vulnerable official
"The School of Greatness" fear shame permission
"Rich Roll Podcast" wont ship unless perfect so freezes vulnerable official
targets.coverage_evidence: Hinted probe: 1/2 land, 1 EXCLUDED-register served. Static: strong — 3 SIO(s) match recommended register (vulnerable/personal) + type. Gap kind: retrieval_gap.
